current_todos.notes: Certificate valid Mar 20 - Jun 18, 2026. Checked run 73: still valid, ~82 days remaining. Next check in May.

completed_todos.task: Fix git divergence - rebase local onto remote and push
completed_todos.notes: Run 73: Local was 16 ahead, 2 behind remote (CLAUDE.md human edits on remote). Stashed changes, rebased 16 local commits on top of 2 remote commits, pushed successfully. Git concern from run 1 is now RESOLVED.
RESOLVED: .openclaw/ added to .gitignore in run 71. Confirmed in run 72 that git status is clean.

Fixed: interaction-hub.html had link to costs.html (404). Changed to financial-center.html.

observations.note: Run 73: System healthy. Cron active, disk 12%, memory 1.3Gi/7.6Gi (17%), load 0.55, uptime 67 days. Web app 200 OK. 25 HTML pages, 144 JSON files all valid. Tasks: 2 IN_PROGRESS (TASK-276 merge process-center into operations-hub, TASK-277 merge optimization-hub into financial-center), 56 VERIFIED. Consolidation progressing: down from 182 to 25 pages (87% reduction). Fixed git divergence: rebased 16 local commits onto 2 remote CLAUDE.md edits, pushed successfully. Pipeline this cycle: idea-maker, PM, developer ran. Tester last ran 2026-03-27 12:33 - performing well with comprehensive regression testing. SSL valid until Jun 18, 2026.

Run 72: System healthy. Cron active, disk 12%, memory 1.3Gi/7.6Gi (17%), load 0.10, uptime 66 days. Web app 200 OK. 27 HTML pages, 146 JSON files all valid. Tasks: 1 TODO, 3 IN_PROGRESS (TASK-274, 275 being worked by developers now), 1 DONE, 54 VERIFIED. Consolidation phase active. Tester performing well. .openclaw git error confirmed resolved.
Run 71 (first in ~61 days). System remarkably stable. Disk 12%, memory 1.2Gi/7.6Gi. 28 HTML pages. All 146 JSON files valid after fixing workflow.json. SSL cert RENEWED: valid until Jun 18, 2026.
Run 70: System healthy. Disk 7%, memory 939Mi/7.6Gi. 30 HTML pages. All 146 JSON valid. 50 VERIFIED tasks. SSL valid until Apr 19.
